tool_args.raw_text: Office of the Queens Borough Commissioner

payload.entity_name: Office of the Queens Borough Commissioner

tool_args.label: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service Community Advisory Committee
tool_args.raw_text: Community Advisory Committee (CAC) will be composed of: Elected Officials, Community Boards, Major Institutions, Community Organizations, Business Representatives, Transit Customers

payload.entity_name: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service Community Advisory Committee
payload.description: The Community Advisory Committee (CAC) will be composed of Elected Officials, Community Boards, Major Institutions, Community Organizations, Business Representatives, Transit Customers. The role of the CAC is to: 1. Act as consistent representatives during the project planning process. 2. Provide opportunities for input as design and implementation progresses. 3. Keep key stakeholders up to date and provide them with information to pass on to others about project details and outreach efforts. 4. Ensure that issues are addressed in a timely manner.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards
tool_args.raw_text: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Blvds are wide thoroughfares unlike others in the city that present a unique opportunity for innovative service and design.

payload.description: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Blvds are wide thoroughfares unlike others in the city that present a unique opportunity for innovative service and design. They create critical connections both locally and to the Rockaways.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: Long Term: Select Bus Service. Woodhaven SBS project will look at all potential changes, focusing on: Faster bus service, Safer streets for pedestrians and drivers, Maintaining appropriate traffic flow for local and through drivers

payload.description: Long-term capital project to implement Select Bus Service on Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards, focusing on faster bus service, safer streets, and maintaining appropriate traffic flow.

tool_args.label: Offset Bus Lanes: Metropolitan Ave to Eliot Ave
tool_args.raw_text: Offset bus lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues. Dedicate one lane for buses and right turns from Metropolitan Ave to Eliot Ave. Proposed to be in effect 7am-7pm M-F.

payload.description: Offset bus lanes between Eliot and Metropolitan Avenues on Woodhaven Boulevard. Dedicate one lane for buses and right turns from Metropolitan Ave to Eliot Ave. General traffic would not have to merge at the bridges. Buses can bypass congestion. Proposed to be in effect 7am-7pm M-F.
payload.location_text: Woodhaven Boulevard between Metropolitan Avenue and Eliot Avenue, Queens

normalized_location.raw_text: Woodhaven Boulevard between Metropolitan Avenue and Eliot Avenue, Queens

tool_args.label: Curbside Bus Lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard
tool_args.raw_text: Curbside bus lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard. Bus lane NB approaching Liberty Ave, SB approaching Rockaway Boulevard. Bus lane in effect 7am-7pm on the last block, and during peak periods on weekdays at other locations.

payload.description: Curbside bus lanes approaching Rockaway Boulevard. Bus lane NB approaching Liberty Ave, SB approaching Rockaway Boulevard. Bus lane in effect 7am-7pm on the last block, and during peak periods on weekdays at other locations (parking remains other times). Allows bus to reach subway connection, bypassing traffic queues without removing travel lanes.
payload.location_text: Rockaway Boulevard approach, Queens: NB approaching Liberty Ave, SB approaching Rockaway Boulevard

normalized_location.raw_text: Rockaway Boulevard approach, Queens: NB approaching Liberty Ave, SB approaching Rockaway Boulevard

tool_args.label: Public Open Houses and Workshops for Woodhaven SBS
tool_args.raw_text: Public open houses and workshops will provide opportunities for broader community input.

payload.description: Public open houses and workshops will provide opportunities for broader community input on the Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards SBS project. Presentations and attendance at Community Board meetings will occur upon request at appropriate points throughout the process.

tool_args.label: Woodhaven Blvd is one of the most dangerous corridors
tool_args.raw_text: Woodhaven Blvd is one of the most dangerous corridors in the city for drivers and pedestrians.

payload.claim_text: Woodhaven Blvd is one of the most dangerous corridors in the city for drivers and pedestrians.
payload.description: Safety claim about Woodhaven Boulevard from the Congested Corridor Study findings

tool_args.label: Woodhaven corridor traffic and safety issues
tool_args.raw_text: High traffic speeds causing unsafe conditions for drivers and pedestrians • Long distances for pedestrian crossing • Heavy congestion at bottlenecks (overpasses) • Medians that make turns difficult for through traffic, forcing buses to use service roads • Slow bus service in need of improvement

payload.claim_text: High traffic speeds causing unsafe conditions for drivers and pedestrians • Long distances for pedestrian crossing • Heavy congestion at bottlenecks (overpasses) • Medians that make turns difficult for through traffic, forcing buses to use service roads • Slow bus service in need of improvement
payload.subject: Woodhaven/Cross Bay Boulevards corridor

tool_args.label: Bus lanes improve bus speeds by about 10%
tool_args.raw_text: Bus lanes have been shown to improve bus speeds by about 10%.

payload.description: Bus lanes have been shown to improve bus speeds by about 10%.

tool_args.label: SBS results: Speed 15-20% faster
tool_args.raw_text: Speed: 15-20% faster

payload.description: SBS results show speed 15-20% faster

tool_args.label: SBS results: Ridership 5-10% increase in first year
tool_args.raw_text: Ridership: 5-10% increase in first year

payload.description: SBS results show ridership 5-10% increase in first year

tool_args.label: SBS results: Customer Satisfaction over 95%
tool_args.raw_text: Customer Satisfaction: over 95% satisfied or very satisfied

payload.description: SBS results show customer satisfaction over 95% satisfied or very satisfied
